title: Django Templates
codeExample:
Blog Posts

{% for post in posts %}

{{ post.title }}

{{ post.created_at|date:"M d, Y" }} by {{ post.author }}

{{ post.excerpt|truncatewords:30 }}

{% empty %}

No posts yet.

{% endfor %}

quiz.question: Which syntax is used for Django template variables?
What does the {% extends "base.html" %} tag do?
options: Includes the content of base.html inline
Makes the current template inherit from base.html
Creates a new block in the template
